# Extração: 03-Facebook Action Plan

- **Fonte:** 03-Facebook Action Plan.pdf
- **Tipo:** PDF

- **Tamanho:** 2.05 MB

---

This action plan supplements the Facebook Manual (10xdownload.com/fb1) to make sure you’re
crystal clear on the actions to take to get your desired results. When in doubt, refer to the
manual. Make it happen!
CREATE AND SET UP FACEBOOK PAGE	STEP
1
Your business page will be your public homepage for your company on Facebook.
While it doesn’t need to be perfect, you should create a page you will be proud to
share. Adding all needed images and information will also help your page get
discovered.
• Facebook Page and Tour Tutorial (10xresource.com/fb1)
• Facebook Page Setup Checklist (10xdownload.com/fb2)
• Design Tool for Cover Image (10xresource.com/canva)
START REGULARLY ADDING CONTENT	STEP
2
Once your page is live, you will immediately want to start adding regular content.
The frequency is up to you, but the important part is being consistent. This can
be a wide variety of content including images, video, stories and live video.
Recommended Resource:
Launch Your Page, Reach 100 Quality
Followers and Start to Monetize!
YOUR GOAL
FACEBOOK ACTION PLAN
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

INVITE FRIENDS AND FAMILY	STEP
3
After your page is up and there is at least one post, you should invite anyone
who you think would support your page. Remember that it isn’t about how
many followers you get, it is how many quality followers that will engage with
your brand on Facebook.
PROMOTE YOUR PAGE EVERYWHERE	STEP
4
Include a link to your Facebook page on your website, on business cards, in your
email footer, anywhere you can think of. If you have an email list, send an email
inviting people to follow you. It helps to let people know why your page will be of
value to them.
ENGAGE AND EXPAND NETWORK DAILY	STEP
5
As you continue to post content, it is essential that you engage with your followers
every single day. Every quality follower is important to get to 100. Reply to every
comment and tag people whenever it is appropriate.
Also, make an effort to follow pages and people within your same niche. Find people
who are highly active on similar pages. You will want to continually expand your
network to get closer and closer to top influencers.
• Facebook Management Checklist (10xdownload.com/fb5)
• Facebook Page Growth Strategy (10xresource.com/fba3)
Recommended Resource:
• Facebook Example Swipe File (10xdownload.com/fb8)
• Facebook Posts and Features Tutorial (10xresource.com/fb2)
• Facebook Content Scheduler Chart (10xdownload.com/fb3)
• Facebook Posting Checklist (10xdownload.com/fb4)
Recommended Resource:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 4 --

BOOST POSTS TO IDEAL TARGET AUDIENCE	STEP
6
Realize that much of what you’re doing with your regular posts is experiment
with messaging. You want to find what most resonates with your core audience.
When you find posts that get a high rate of likes or comments, spend a little
money boosting those posts to your target audience. More details on boosting
posts in the manual.
BEGIN TO SHARE YOUR PRODUCT OR SERVICE	STEP
7
Remember, your goal is to first make real connections and start to grow your
network. As you get 100 quality followers who are true supporters of your brand,
you can begin to invite them to your offers via comments and direct messages.
• Facebook Monetization Strategy (10xdownload.com/fb7 )
Recommended Resource:
• Create a Facebook Group (optional for growth)
• Build a Messenger Chatbot (optional for monetization)
MAKE YOUR FIRST SALE AND CELEBRATE!	STEP
8
If you do it right, people who buy will love you even more!
Additional Strategies:
